challenge.headline: Recruiting Is Overwhelming Without Direction
challenge.description: Student-athletes struggle to identify opportunities that align with their goals and potential. The lack of accessible insights and structured guidance leads to inefficient decision-making and missed opportunities.

result.headline: Athletes Recruit With Clarity and Confidence
result.quote: Scoutside delivers a more confident and structured path through the recruiting process. Athletes are better equipped to evaluate opportunities, focus their efforts more effectively, and make informed decisions about their future.
